design_philosophy.mood: Aggressive, High-Tech Pharmacological, Premium Underground, Potent
design_philosophy.visual_style: Cyberpunk Gym Aesthetics - Deep blacks, glowing neon reds, metallic golds, smoke textures

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] uppercase tracking-wider shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(220,38,38,0.5)] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(220,38,38,0.8)] hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-yellow-600 text-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-600/10 font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] uppercase tracking-wider transition-all
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#128C7E] text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105

cards.feature: bg-neutral-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-neutral-800 p-6 hover:border-red-600/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden
cards.product: bg-gradient-to-b from-neutral-900 to-black border border-neutral-800 p-6 flex flex-col items-center hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] transition-all

inputs.default: bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 text-white p-3 focus:border-red-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-600 outline-none transition-colors placeholder:text-neutral-600

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento Grid' strategy. Mix wide spans (col-span-2) with tall spans (row-span-2). Use gap-4 or gap-6.
layout.spacing: Generous vertical spacing (py-20 or py-32) between sections. Tight spacing within component groups.

assets.icons: Use lucide-react (Beaker, Flame, Shield, Activity, Zap, Star, Play, CheckCircle)

guidelines: Hero elements should slide up and fade in with a slight delay.
Buttons should scale slightly (1.05) on hover with a glow intensification.
Scroll animations: elements fade in as they enter viewport (useInView).

sections_structure.name: Hero
elements: Background: Dark with smoke texture overlay (low opacity)
Center: Massive 'SUSTANON' typography in metallic/gold gradient
Image: Floating Sustanon bottle with red backlight glow
Urgency: 'Oferta por tempo limitado' with countdown

sections_structure.name: Products (The Stack)
elements: Carousel or Grid of other products (Primobolan, Masteron, Enantato)
Price tags clearly visible in Gold

sections_structure.name: Reviews (Evidence)
elements: Video Player wrappers with custom 'Play' overlay

sections_structure.name: Guarantee & Trust
elements: Note: DO NOT use Emergent badge

universal_guidelines: Theme: Dark Mode Only. Force 'dark' class on HTML or Body.
Do NOT use gradients for text readability - keep body text high contrast (gray-300 on black).
Use red glow sparingly - only for what matters (CTA, Key Product).
Images must be optimized/constrained. Max height 80vh for hero image.
Video elements must use lazy loading (preload='none') and a poster image.
Social Links must be functional: WhatsApp (https://wa.me/5521972232170), Insta (https://instagram.com/suplementosmaisbaratos), FB (https://facebook.com/complementosmaisbaratos).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.
